Reference
Setup setPrinter()

Resources
Guides p5.fab PrimerIntro to Creative CodingIntro to Digital Fabrication
Tutorials Getting StartedCubeInteractive CubeNon-PlanarLine VaseEtch-a-Sketch

extrudeXY()

Move a relative distance in X and Y while extruding.

Parameters

Name Type Description
dx number Distance to move in X in mm.
dy number Distance to move in Y in mm.
v number Feedrate in mm/min.
e number | null Extrusion amount in mm. Calculated automatically if null.
multiplier? boolean If true, treat `e` as a multiplier on the auto-calculated extrusion. Default: false.
comment? string Optional G-code comment. Default: ''.

Example

function fabDraw() {
  fab.extrudeXY(30, 40, 1500); // extrude diagonally
}
